name: TreeSelect
description: Select input with a hierarchical tree dropdown.

api.name: TreeSelect
api.description: Select input with a hierarchical tree dropdown.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The selected node's value (single-select mode). Use Values instead when Multiple is true.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Fired when the selected node changes (single-select mode). Binding it makes Value controlled.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: The hierarchical node tree rendered in the dropdown.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown in the trigger when nothing is selected. Defaults to the localized "TreeSelect.Placeholder" string.

parameters.name: Searchable
parameters.description: Shows a search box at the top of the dropdown that filters nodes by label, auto-expanding ancestors of every match.

parameters.name: Multiple
parameters.description: Enables multi-select mode: any node (leaf or parent) toggles into Values on click, and aria-checked reflects tri-state selection for parents with partially-selected descendants.

parameters.name: Values
parameters.description: The selected node values (multi-select mode, used when Multiple is true).

parameters.name: ValuesChanged
parameters.description: Fired when the selection changes in multi-select mode. Binding it makes Values controlled.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger, preventing the dropdown from opening.

parameters.name: ExpandAll
parameters.description: Expands every node with children when the tree first renders (and whenever Items is replaced with a new reference).

parameters.name: Clearable
parameters.description: Shows a clear button in the trigger when a selection exists, letting the user reset Value/Values in one click.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, rendering an asterisk next to Label and setting aria-required on the trigger.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state on the trigger. Also set implicitly when a wrapping FormField reports a validation error.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when Invalid is true (and the tree select is not nested inside a FormField).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when there is no error (and the tree select is not nested inside a FormField).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered above the trigger. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label instead.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The form field name, forwarded for consistency with other form controls (not rendered directly by this component).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the wrapper div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the wrapper div.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Fired when the selected node changes (single-select mode). Binding it makes Value controlled.

events.name: ValuesChanged
events.description: Fired when the selection changes in multi-select mode. Binding it makes Values controlled.

examples.title: Basic Tree Select
examples.code:
<TreeSelect @bind-Value="_selected" Items="@_categories" />

@code {
    private string? _selected;
    private List<TreeSelect.TreeSelectItem> _categories = new()
    {
        new() { Label = "Electronics", Value = "electronics", Children = new()
        {
            new() { Label = "Phones", Value = "phones" },
            new() { Label = "Computers", Value = "computers" },
        }},
        new() { Label = "Books", Value = "books" },
    };
}

examples.title: Multi-select
examples.code:
<TreeSelect Values="@_values" ValuesChanged="@(v => _values = v)"
            Items="@_categories" Multiple="true" Searchable="true" />

mdSummary:
# TreeSelect

Select input with a hierarchical tree dropdown.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/tree-select

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TreeSelect | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| TreeSelect | Value | `string?` | `` | The selected node's value (single-select mode). Use Values instead when Multiple is true. |
| TreeSelect | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Fired when the selected node changes (single-select mode). Binding it makes Value controlled. |
| TreeSelect | Items | `List<TreeSelectItem>` | `new()` | The hierarchical node tree rendered in the dropdown. |
| TreeSelect | Placeholder | `string?` | `` | Placeholder shown in the trigger when nothing is selected. Defaults to the localized "TreeSelect.Placeholder" string. |
| TreeSelect | Searchable | `bool` | `false` | Shows a search box at the top of the dropdown that filters nodes by label, auto-expanding ancestors of every match. |
| TreeSelect | Multiple | `bool` | `false` | Enables multi-select mode: any node (leaf or parent) toggles into Values on click, and aria-checked reflects tri-state selection for parents with partially-selected descendants. |
| TreeSelect | Values | `List<string>?` | `` | The selected node values (multi-select mode, used when Multiple is true). |
| TreeSelect | ValuesChanged | `EventCallback<List<string>?>` | `` | Fired when the selection changes in multi-select mode. Binding it makes Values controlled. |
| TreeSelect | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the trigger, preventing the dropdown from opening. |
| TreeSelect | ExpandAll | `bool` | `false` | Expands every node with children when the tree first renders (and whenever Items is replaced with a new reference). |
| TreeSelect | Clearable | `bool` | `false` | Shows a clear button in the trigger when a selection exists, letting the user reset Value/Values in one click. |
| TreeSelect | Required | `bool` | `false` | Marks the field as required, rendering an asterisk next to Label and setting aria-required on the trigger. |
| TreeSelect | Invalid | `bool` | `false` | Forces the invalid/error visual state on the trigger. Also set implicitly when a wrapping FormField reports a validation error. |
| TreeSelect | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the field when Invalid is true (and the tree select is not nested inside a FormField). |
| TreeSelect | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the field when there is no error (and the tree select is not nested inside a FormField). |
| TreeSelect | Label | `string?` | `` | Label rendered above the trigger. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label instead. |
| TreeSelect | Name | `string?` | `` | The form field name, forwarded for consistency with other form controls (not rendered directly by this component). |
| TreeSelect | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the wrapper div. |
| TreeSelect | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the wrapper div. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`) — Fired when the selected node changes (single-select mode). Binding it makes Value controlled.
- `ValuesChanged` (`EventCallback<List<string>?>`) — Fired when the selection changes in multi-select mode. Binding it makes Values controlled.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in TreeSelect.razor

## Example
```razor
<TreeSelect />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/TreeSelect/TreeSelect.razor`
